channel.title: Semiotica
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Semiotica

item.title: Aspects of AI semiotics: enunciation, agency, and creativity
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2025-0014

item.title: The myth of meaning: generative AI as language-endowed machines and the machinic essence of the human being
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0204

item.title: La notion de vérité à l’épreuve de l’intelligence artificielle
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0201

item.title: From grammar to text: a semiotic perspective on a paradigm shift in computation and its usages
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0187

item.title: Rationalités correctives et intelligence artificielle assistée : les doubles contraintes des humanités numériques
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0189

item.title: Semiotics of artificial intelligence: enunciative praxis in image analysis and generation
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0195

item.title: La machine crée, mais énonce-t-elle? Le computationnel et le digital mis en débat
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0188

item.title: ChatGPT and the others: artificial intelligence, social actors, and political communication. A tentative sociosemiotic glance
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0210

item.title: Les IA génératives visuelles entre perception d’archives et circuits de composition
item.description: Article by Enzo D’Armenio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0184
